name: Structured Summary Writer
when_to_use: Пишет короткие, high-signal сводки для Linear comments, PR descriptions, release notes, postmortems и status updates.
Seed rationale: Агентная система умирает, если люди не понимают, что именно уже сделано и что осталось.
inputs: Форматы: work summary, blocker summary, question summary, PR summary, release summary, monitoring summary. Всегда указывать facts / unknowns / asks / links.
steps: TBD: convert the seed build spec into a stable step-by-step skill contract.
stop_conditions: TBD: define success and stop boundaries before runtime consumption.
escalation_rules: Escalate when the required source-of-truth inputs are missing, contradictory, or blocked by a human-owned zone.
anti_patterns: Do not duplicate always-on repo guidance inside selective skills.
Do not silently widen role scope beyond the owning skill pack.
denied_actions: Do not treat this skeleton metadata as runtime-ready execution logic before the later runtime-consumption blocks.
description: Пишет короткие, high-signal сводки для Linear comments, PR descriptions, release notes, postmortems и status updates.
why: Агентная система умирает, если люди не понимают, что именно уже сделано и что осталось.
build_spec: Форматы: work summary, blocker summary, question summary, PR summary, release summary, monitoring summary. Всегда указывать facts / unknowns / asks / links.
